title: Lets try finding 30111 changes
wikitext:
[]: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Mar 11, 2023 7:15 pm This absolutely minor change is giving me the motivation I've needed. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) I think we might even be able to coordinate the search? Like divide the film into parts and assign each one to a different user that has the new version.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by nerv bae » Sat Mar 11, 2023 8:40 pm Subtle but interesting. I can take a 10 minute chunk and start staring at both versions of it next week.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Mar 12, 2023 5:50 am Awesome! Let's see if some more people are willing haha. I don't mind a big chunk, I'd even do it with the whole film, it'd just take me really long lol. And I don't trust myself to find stuff like that Ritsuko change.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by HeadstrongWolf » Fri Mar 17, 2023 3:26 pm I checked a few different rips of the bluray version, and they all seem to have an issue with coloring, both the 1080p encode and the 2160p encode. The Amazon version has more saturated colors, but the bluray, for some reason, has more faded coloring. This is very noticeable on anything that involves the color red, but isn't applied to just that color. Feel free to correct me if I'm wrong.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Mar 17, 2023 7:45 pm I've seen similar comments on twitter. Could be a genuine artistic choice. But not sure... This bluray took some time so I imagine they made sure it's perfect.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Mar 18, 2023 12:18 am God I would kill for Khara to release the theatrical cuts to us in some form. Maybe when they inevitably release the $700 BD box in 2048....

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by nerv bae » Sat Mar 18, 2023 8:17 am Whoops, I dropped the ball on this. Okay, uhh, next next week. But I did just manage to validate that I can find the twitter thread's Ritsuko example: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Mar 18, 2023 10:37 am ∆ Awesome! I hope I get started today already lol. I have been postponing it too.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by HeadstrongWolf » Sat Mar 18, 2023 6:16 pm kuribo-04 wrote: I've seen similar comments on twitter. Could be a genuine artistic choice. But not sure... This bluray took some time so I imagine they made sure it's perfect.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Mar 18, 2023 6:27 pm Holy fuck this is even worse that the "green tint of doom"! How the hell could something like that pass Control Quality?!

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by Zeruel48 » Sat Mar 18, 2023 6:44 pm That's not actually an issue with the release. The UHD disc uses the BT.2020 color space (Meant for HDR, which this movie is not) which shows incorrectly in players that aren't set up right. When correctly played, it's the same if not better than Amazon. If there is an actual QC issue, it's that bright whites are tinted green for some reason (present in every release and 3.333)

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by HeadstrongWolf » Sat Mar 18, 2023 6:46 pm Zeruel48 wrote: That's not actually an issue with the release. The UHD disc uses the BT.2020 color space (Meant for HDR, which this movie is not) which shows incorrectly in players that aren't set up right. When correctly played, it's the same if not better than Amazon. If there is an actual QC issue, it's that bright whites are tinted green for some reason (present in every release and 3.333)

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by Zeruel48 » Sat Mar 18, 2023 7:12 pm HeadstrongWolf wrote: Zeruel48#939833 wrote: That's not actually an issue with the release. The UHD disc uses the BT.2020 color space (Meant for HDR, which this movie is not) which shows incorrectly in players that aren't set up right. When correctly played, it's the same if not better than Amazon. If there is an actual QC issue, it's that bright whites are tinted green for some reason (present in every release and 3.333)

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Mar 19, 2023 4:40 am I'm currently watching both versions of the film side by side, looking for changes (if there are any!). Regarding the colors, I have to say there is very little difference in what I'm seeing. BD is less saturated but I couldnt say which version I prefer. The screenshots posted in this topic look very different from what I'm seeing. I'm seeing both on one screen btw. EDIT: No changes found. Apart from color grading and Ritsuko face. If there are changes and I missed them I imagine they are Ritsuko face level. This must be one reason the shorts were included. And it just makes sense. By 3.0+1.01 the film was probably already perfect. LOL if Ritsuko is actually the only redraw.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by AsukaShikinami10 » Tue Mar 28, 2023 3:08 pm Do you guys know if there are changes in the mass-produced Evas we saw being built inside Neo Nerv's HQ in 3.33? Did the production change the light green/beige color palette that ressembled the original Mark.07s from the NTP to a more accurate one that matches what we saw in the final production of Shin Eva or did it stay the same in 3.333?

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Mar 28, 2023 8:16 pm IIRC it is unchanged in 3.333.

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Wed Mar 29, 2023 1:26 am AsukaShikinami10 wrote: Do you guys know if there are changes in the mass-produced Evas we saw being built inside Neo Nerv's HQ in 3.33? Did the production change the light green/beige color palette that ressembled the original Mark.07s from the NTP to a more accurate one that matches what we saw in the final production of Shin Eva or did it stay the same in 3.333?

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Mar 29, 2023 2:19 am They never got a name, but given that the Mk.07s have quite similar facial features to Mk.06 (look at the chin especially), I'd say that it's a reasonable assumption that they were supposed to be the 07s in production initially

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed Mar 29, 2023 2:53 am DantesInferno wrote: Do we know for certain that those are supposed to be the Mark.07s?

[]: Re: Let's try finding 3.0+1.11 changes!             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Mar 29, 2023 3:14 am Huh, haven't seen those concept arts before. Cool stuff!
